upload_local_staging_flush_failed: The server failed while flushing a local upload staging file. Please try again
upload_body_size_overflow: The uploaded content exceeded the server's size handling limits. Upload the file again
upload_empty_file: The uploaded content was empty. Choose a file and try again
upload_direct_relay_write_failed: The server failed while relaying the direct upload stream. Please try again
upload_direct_relay_shutdown_failed: The server failed while finishing the direct upload relay. Please try again
upload_direct_relay_task_failed: The server failed while running the direct upload relay task. Please try again
upload_declared_size_invalid: The declared upload size was invalid. Start the upload again
upload_hash_temp_open_failed: The server failed to open the temporary upload file. Please try again
upload_hash_temp_read_failed: The server failed while hashing the temporary upload file. Please try again
upload_chunk_transport_mismatch: This upload session does not accept that chunk upload mode. Start the upload again
upload_chunk_session_invalid: The upload session chunk metadata is invalid. Start the upload again
upload_chunk_number_out_of_range: The uploaded chunk number is invalid. Start the upload again
upload_chunk_size_mismatch: A chunk size did not match the upload session. Start the upload again
upload_chunk_persist_failed: Failed to persist an uploaded chunk. Please try again
upload_session_not_found: The upload session does not exist. Start the upload again
upload_session_expired: The upload session has expired. Start the upload again
chunk_upload_failed: A file chunk failed to upload. Please try again
upload_status_conflict: The upload state has already changed. Refresh and try again
upload_completed_file_missing: The upload finished, but its file record is missing. Refresh and try again
upload_previous_failure: This upload had already failed earlier. Start a new upload
upload_parts_required: Multipart completion is missing the required part list
upload_incomplete_chunks: The upload is not complete yet because some chunks are still missing
upload_incomplete_parts: The upload is not complete yet because some server-side parts are still missing
upload_missing_part: The uploaded parts are incomplete. Start the upload again
upload_temp_object_missing: The uploaded temporary object could not be found. Upload the file again
upload_temp_object_size_mismatch: The uploaded temporary object failed size verification. Upload the file again
upload_session_corrupted: The upload session is in an invalid state. Start the upload again
upload_chunk_relay_failed: Failed to relay uploaded chunks through the server. Please try again
upload_assembly_io_failed: The server failed while assembling the uploaded file. Please try again
upload_assembly_size_overflow: The server detected an invalid assembled upload size. Upload the file again
upload_assembling: The file is still being assembled on the server. Please try again shortly
